pageContext.name: Loki President Variant
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios present the latest from the Art Scale 1:10 line - the Loki President Variant Statue from Marvel's Loki on Disney Plus! Based on the likeness of Tom Hiddleston, this polystone Loki statue is hand-painted and limited edition.   Marvel fans, don't miss your chance to add the God of Mischief to your Marvel collection!
